x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: DEX and Now Assist must both be active for AI-powered device diagnosis and agentic endpoint workflows. Without both plugins, DEX AI capabilities including conversational diagnosis and automated remediation are completely unavailable.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Informational check — no remediation required. Monitor retirement rate as a governance health signal. High retirement rates indicate active KB hygiene which is positive for Now Assist AI Search quality.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_3af8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c43
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[DEX and Now Assist must both be active for AI-powered device diagnosis and agentic endpoint workflows. Without both plugins, DEX AI capabilities including conversational diagnosis and automated remediation are completely unavailable.]]></ai_justification><check_name>KB Article Retirement Rate</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaRetired = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaRetired.addQuery('workflow_state', 'retired');
    gaRetired.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaRetired.query();
    var retired = gaRetired.next() ? parseInt(gaRetired.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = total > 0 ? Math.round((retired / total) * 100) : 0;
    var actualValue = pct + '% retired (' + retired + ' of ' + total + ' articles)';

    // Informational check — active retirement indicates good KB hygiene
    return {
        status: 'ready',
        actualValue: actualValue,
        finding: 'KB retirement rate: ' + pct + '% (' + retired + ' retired of ' + total + ' total). Active article retirement is a positive signal — it indicates KB governance is in place to keep Now Assist AI Search content current and accurate.'
    };
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000317</number><order>30</order><remediation_guidance>Informational check — no remediation required. Monitor retirement rate as a governance health signal. High retirement rates indicate active KB hygiene which is positive for Now Assist AI Search quality.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>3af8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c43</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>KB Article Retirement Rate</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_3af8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c43</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
